news.title: Stripe’s 2025 annual letter
news.summary: This year's letter explores the unprecedented speed of the 2025 startup class, the rise of global-by-default businesses, the evolution of agentic commerce, and why we’re optimistic about the future of the internet economy.

news.title: Stripe's total payment volume reaches $1.4T, fueled by long-standing investments in AI
news.summary: Newsroom · Stripe Press · Contact · Contact sales · Become a partner · February 27, 2025 · Stripe’s total payment volume increased to $1.4T in 2024, up 38% year-on-year, and equivalent to around 1.3% of global GDP.
